visual_description: The audio is filled with the ambient sounds of a busy office environment. A low, indistinct murmur of multiple conversations creates a sense of a bustling workplace. The scene opens with a medium shot of an older man with gray hair, dressed in a light-colored suit jacket and a blue shirt, sitting at a dark table. He is hunched over, eating from a white takeout container with chopsticks. In front of him are several other takeout trays filled with various food items. The background is a dimly lit, crowded space, suggesting a breakroom or a busy office environment. Other people are visible in the blurred background, some standing and talking. In the top left corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera is static, focusing on the man as he eats. The sound of footsteps on a hard floor is prominent, echoing slightly as people walk by, adding to the atmosphere of movement and activity. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man in a light blue collared shirt and a striped tie, walking purposefully through a crowded office hallway. He has a serious expression on his face.
